items.title: What if Jesus was born in the Levant instead of Salt Lake City, Utah?
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Hawaii storms have caused $1bn in damage, governor says
items.dek: The full scale of the damages to roads and other infrastructure from rain and flooding in the state must still be assessed, Gov Josh Green says.
items.body: The full scale of the damages to roads and other infrastructure from rain and flooding in the state must still be assessed, Gov Josh Green says.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Israel to expand ground and air attacks against Hezbollah in Lebanon
items.dek: There are fears in Lebanon that Israel is preparing for a large-scale ground invasion.
items.body: There are fears in Lebanon that Israel is preparing for a large-scale ground invasion.
items.author: IriLine Desk
